grades.expectation: Response mentions checking competentperson.co.uk to verify if installer was registered
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions searching via https://www.competentperson.co.uk to locate certificates or identify the scheme/provider

grades.expectation: Response mentions FENSA specifically as the relevant competent person scheme for windows
grades.reason: Clearly identifies FENSA as a key scheme for windows and mentions requesting FENSA certificates

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes between self-certification (competent person) and local authority routes
grades.reason: Clearly distinguishes between self-certification under competent person schemes vs regularisation through Building Control

grades.expectation: Response warns about the 'no approach' rule before pursuing indemnity insurance
grades.reason: Explicitly warns not to contact local authority first as it makes indemnity insurance unavailable, and emphasizes this rule multiple times

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part L (energy efficiency/insulation) as relevant regulation for windows
grades.reason: Specifically mentions Part L – conservation of fuel/energy efficiency/thermal performance as the relevant regulation
